# Module-size allowlist — grandfathered files over the 800-LOC soft cap.
#
# Policy (docs/architecture.md "Module-size policy"): target 200-500 LOC/file,
# soft cap 800. The CI "module-size gate" (.github/workflows/test.yml) FAILS when a
# file exceeds 800 LOC and is NOT listed here — so the over-cap set cannot silently
# grow. To add a file here you must ALSO add a remedy row to the offenders table in
# docs/architecture.md (the two are kept in lock-step). Prefer splitting along an
# existing call-graph seam over allow-listing.
#
# One repo-relative path per line. Keep sorted.
src/rebar/__init__.py
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/applier.py
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_differ.py
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py
src/rebar/config.py
src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_refs.py
src/rebar/mcp_server.py
</content>
